content.claim: Diagnostic/assessment services (Pedagógiai szakszolgálat) report capacity constraints including multi-month waiting lists, staff turnover, and insufficient medical backup, creating a documented bottleneck early in the identify-assess-serve sequence.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: The maintaining authority denied maintaining waiting lists, directly contradicting frontline practitioner testimony
No independent audit of waiting-list claims or capacity metrics was found in available sources
The petition represents practitioner self-reporting rather than external capacity audit
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
